gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6 / 567)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6 / 567)

parts.text: الرِّضَا (عليه السلام) فَأَنْزَلَ اللَّهُ سَكِينَتَهُ عَلَى رَسُولِهِ
أَيَّدَهُ بِجُنُودٍ لَمْ تَرَوْهَا قُلْتُ هَكَذَا

en.hubeali: H 15018 – Muhammad, from Ahmad, from Ibn Fazzaal, who has said:

Al-Rezaasws regarding: “[9:40] So Allah sent down His tranquillity upon him and strengthened him with hosts which you did not see”. I said, ‘Like this?’ Heasws said: ‘This is how weasws recite it, and this is how it was Revealed’.
en.sarwar: 572. Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Muhammad Bin Khalid and Al-Husayn Bin Saeed, from Al-Nazar Bin Suweyd, from Yahya Al-Halby, from Ibn Muskaan, from Ammar Bin Suweyd who said: ‘I heard Abu Abdullah (a.s.) saying regarding this Verse: “[11:12] Then, it may be that you will give up part of what is revealed to you and your breast will become straitened by it because they say: Why has not a treasure been sent down upon him or an angel come with him?”, When the Rasool Allah (saww) encamped at Qudeyd and said to Ali (a.s.): ‘O Ali (a.s.)! I (saww) asked my (saww) Lord (azwj) to Establish friendship between me (a.s.) and you (a.s.), so He (azwj) Did it. And I (saww) asked my (saww) Lord (azwj) to Establish brotherhood between me (saww) and you (a.s.), so he (azwj) Did it. And I (saww) asked my (saww) Lord (azwj) to Make you (a.s.) to be my (saww) successor, so He (azwj) Did it. Two men (Abu Bakr and Umar) from Qureysh said, ‘By Allah (azwj)! A Sa’a (unit of measurement) of dates in a basket is more beloved to us than what Muhammad (saww) asked his (saww) Lord (azwj) for. So, had he (saww) asked his (saww) Lord (azwj) for an Angel to support him (saww) against his (saww) enemies, or a treasure to make us to be needless by it from the hunger. By Allah (azwj)! He (saww) does not supplicate to Him (azwj), be it true or false, but that He (azwj) Answers him (saww)’. So Allah (azwj), Glorious and High Revealed: “[11:12] Then, it may be that you will give up part of what is revealed to you and your breast will become straitened by it” – up to the end of the Verse’.
